title: Alfedov Totems
description: A simple resource pack that adds the totems of Alfedov.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50e187f513ca1b7557d16f48f2df564055dd1463.png)

## The resource pack adds four varieties of totems, which can be obtained by renaming the totem of immortality.

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar&x=fda0) or [CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod Required.

This is a fun resource pack that adds some totems.YouTuber - [Alfedov](https://www.youtube.com/@iAlfedov)
